ksa_text: Ability to develop and communicate data quality investment strategies that prioritize remediation efforts based on business impact and organizational decision-making needs.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("data quality"). STRM composite score is strong (0.4255, top tier for this dataset); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.
